roa.docketEntryComment: ORDER TERMINATING STAY AWAY ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE COLLINS IN DEPT 14

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:KATHERINE SELIGMAN/WIT SWORN DA:WILLION WONG/WIT SWORN DA:ELLEN MOFFATT/EXHM:DEFENSE B, XEROX BLACK AND WHITE DOCUMENT LABELED SCENE OVERVIEW/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, PHOTO OF A WHITE MALESTANDING UP AND FACING FORWARD; PEOPLE'S 2, PHOTO OF A WHITE MALE STANDINGFROM A PROFILE; PEOPLE'S 3, PHOTO SHOWING A GLOVED HAND HOLDING A KNIFE; PEOPLE'S 4, PHOTO OF A MAN LAYING ONTHE GROUND; PEOPLE'S 5, CLOSE UP PHOTO OFA MAN'S CHEST; DEFENSE A, PHOTOGRAPH OF HEAD AND NECK AREA SHOWING SOME BLOOD ON THE TEMPLE; DEFENSE C, PHOTO SHOWINGSOMEONE HOLDING UP THE FRONT OFA PAIR OF GREEN PANTS; DEFENSE D, PHOTO SHOWING SOMEONE HOLDING UP THE BACKOF A PAIR OF GREEN PANTS; DEFENSEE, COLORPHOTO SHOWING SOMEONE HOLDING A KNIFE TO THE SIDE WITH THE BLADE SIDE ON THE TOP; DEFENSE F, PHOTO SHOWING BLACK FOLDING KNIFE AND PLASTIC PIECE; DEFENSE G, PHOTO SIMILAR TO DEFENSE F, FINGERS CAN BE SEEN IN CORNER; DEFENSE H, PHOTO SHOWING PATHWAY IN PARK;DEFENSE I, PHOTO SHOWING  UNDERSIDE OF ARM AND HAND; DEFENSE J, PHOTO SHOWING ARM/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X: DEFENDANT WAS ARRAIGNED BY THE COURT/BAIL:1000000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA1:CAROLYNNE S RAY/SA2:50 ROCKRIDGE  DRIVE,SF/SAORD/CONTD:ENTRY OF PLEA;DESIGNATION OF PD & TO SET/
/X:STIPULATION T0 NEW LAST DAY/LD:09-24-10/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FORPRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X JUDGE LITTLE ALOW DEFENDANT TO PULLED TIME/LD:09-13-10/
/CAL:TO SET/TE:HALF DAY/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP /CONTD:TO SET IN M20/DOP/
/CAL:ENTRY OF PLEA & DISIGNATION/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//DEF:PERSONALLY ENTERS NOT GUILTY PLEA/DEFTARR1/STWPX/TO SET/
